name: Honey-Apple Pancakes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, stir together flour, baking powder, salt, apple pie spice, and baking soda.
2. In a small bowl, stir together the egg, apple juice, honey, and oil; add all at once to the flour mixture, stirring until mixed but still slightly lumpy.
3. Spray a cold nonstick griddle or heavy skillet with nonstick spray for coating.
4. Preheat the griddle or skillet over medium heat.
5. For each pancake, pour about 1/4 cup of the batter onto the hot griddle or skillet.
6. Cook for 2 to 3 minutes, or until the pancakes have a bubbly surface and slightly dry edges.
7. Turn the pancakes; cook for 2 to 3 more minutes, or until brown.
121 calories, 3 g total fat, 1 g saturated fat, 27 mg cholesterol, 93 mg sodium, 21 g carbohydrate, 1 g fiber, 3 g protein.
SOURCE: BH&G Quick, Healthy, and Delicious Cooking (pg. 177)
